allow: Bash(find "$HOME/Library/Application Support/Claude" "$HOME/.claude" /Applications/Claude.app -name "node" -type f 2>/dev/null | head -5; echo ---; find "$HOME" -maxdepth 4 -name "node" -type f -not -path "*/node_modules/*" 2>/dev/null | head -5; echo ---; ls /usr/bin | grep -E '^\(node|npm\)' ; ls /opt 2>/dev/null)
